name: condition-dedup-probe
description: Probe for duplicate condition creation when the narrator describes the same injury across consecutive turns. Tests whether CB emits new_condition for an injury that already has an active condition_id.

request_template.action: I am a wanderer walking through a thorny thicket. The thorns scratch my arms deeply as I push through.
request_template.WORLD_PROMPT: A dense, overgrown forest path choked with brambles and thorny vines.
